name: Fast Vessel Changer
abstract: Cycle through selected vessels with timer-based switching and in-flight controls
description: FastVesselChanger adds a flight window for cycling between selected vessels on a configurable timer, with one-click Next/Refresh controls, vessel-type filtering, and per-vessel selection. It also includes optional camera rotation and zoom tracking, plus per-player saved settings when LunaMultiplayer is present.
author: AdmiralRadish
